tasks.title: Stabilize OpenRouter ideation stage
tasks.description: Harden OpenRouter generation so candidate output remains valid and deterministic under retries, model catalog drift, and budget/time constraints.
tasks.details: Audit and strengthen ideation stage contracts, retries, cache keys, and fallback behavior. Ensure candidate provenance is complete per run.
tasks.testStrategy: Run fixture and live smoke modes; verify schema-conformant candidate output and deterministic fail-open behavior.

subtasks.title: Codify ideation SLOs and failure modes
subtasks.description: Define explicit SLOs for success rate, timeout rate, and empty-response handling.
subtasks.details: Implemented ideation SLO codification in `scripts/branding/naming_ideation_stage.py` via `evaluate_ideation_slo(...)` and wired it into `scripts/branding/naming_campaign_runner.py`. Added SLO knobs: `--llm-slo-min-success-rate`, `--llm-slo-max-timeout-rate`, `--llm-slo-max-empty-rate`, `--llm-slo-min-samples`, and deterministic fail-open toggle `--llm-slo-fail-open/--no-llm-slo-fail-open`. Progress CSV rows now include SLO status/rates/breaches so run health is visible without tailing logs.

subtasks.title: Add fixture parity checks
subtasks.description: Ensure fixture mode mirrors provider response shape and parser paths.
subtasks.details: Added fixture/provider parser parity by extracting shared response parsing into `extract_openrouter_response_content(...)` and introducing `load_fixture_candidates_with_usage(...)`. Fixture mode now accepts OpenRouter-shaped envelopes (`choices[].message.content`) and usage metadata, and still falls back safely to JSON/line parsing. Added unit coverage in `scripts/branding/test_naming_ideation_stage.py` for OpenRouter-shape fixture parsing and response extraction edge cases.

tasks.title: Parallelize validation safely
tasks.description: Increase validator throughput with bounded parallelism and stronger DB contention controls.
tasks.details: Evaluate in-process asyncio scaling versus shard-level parallel workers. Add guardrails for SQLite lock pressure.
tasks.testStrategy: Benchmark jobs/sec across representative candidate/check counts and validate stable summaries.

subtasks.title: Enable WAL mode and busy_timeout for SQLite contention resilience
subtasks.description: Configure SQLite connections in naming_db.py and naming_validate_async.py to use WAL journal mode and a busy_timeout, reducing lock contention for concurrent readers/writers.
subtasks.details: Completed via shared SQLite configuration in `scripts/branding/naming_db.py` (`configure_connection`, `open_connection`) with WAL + busy_timeout + foreign_keys. `scripts/branding/naming_validate_async.py` now accepts `--sqlite-busy-timeout-ms` and applies it to both primary DB and memory DB connections before schema/data operations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: open two connections to same DB, start a write transaction on one, verify the second connection can still read (WAL) and that a write on the second connection waits up to busy_timeout before failing. Verify PRAGMA values with `PRAGMA journal_mode` and `PRAGMA busy_timeout` queries after ensure_schema().

subtasks.title: Extract DB connection factory with configurable PRAGMAs
subtasks.description: Create a shared connection factory function in naming_db.py that centralizes SQLite connection setup (WAL, busy_timeout, foreign_keys) for use by all scripts.
subtasks.details: Completed by adding `open_connection(db_path, busy_timeout_ms=..., wal=...)` in `scripts/branding/naming_db.py` and wiring it into `naming_db.py` CLI `main()` plus `scripts/branding/naming_validate_async.py:orchestrate()`. Added regression tests in `scripts/branding/test_naming_db.py` for PRAGMA correctness and contention behavior.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: call open_connection with a temp DB path, verify journal_mode is 'wal', busy_timeout matches the provided value, and foreign_keys is ON. Verify ensure_schema still works when called on the returned connection.

subtasks.title: Batch DB writes in run_single_job to reduce lock acquisition frequency
subtasks.description: Reduce the number of db_lock acquisitions in naming_validate_async.py's run_single_job by batching status updates and result writes into fewer critical sections.
subtasks.details: Completed in `scripts/branding/naming_validate_async.py`: combined `running` status update and cheap-cache lookup into one lock section, preserving result+completion as one section. Added `--track-job-lifecycle/--no-track-job-lifecycle` (default on) to optionally skip intermediate lifecycle writes. Added test coverage in `scripts/branding/test_naming_validate_async.py` (`test_run_single_job_uses_two_lock_acquisitions_on_success`) to enforce two lock acquisitions on successful non-retry path.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run the existing test suite in test_naming_validate_async.py to verify no regressions. Add a timing assertion or counter that tracks db_lock acquisition count per job in a test scenario with mock runners, verifying the count is <= 2 for a successful non-cached job.

subtasks.title: Add per-shard DB isolation with merge step in campaign runner
subtasks.description: Modify naming_campaign_runner.py to give each shard its own SQLite database, then merge results into a unified DB after the campaign completes, eliminating cross-shard write contention entirely.
subtasks.details: Completed in `scripts/branding/naming_campaign_runner.py`: added `--shard-db-isolation/--no-shard-db-isolation` and `--merge-shards/--no-merge-shards`. Worker shards now use isolated DB paths (`*_shard<N>.db`) for ingest/generator/validator/assert. Added `merge_shard_databases(...)` on shard 0 to merge candidates + validation_results + candidate_scores + shortlist_decisions back into main DB with name-normalized mapping. Smoke verified with 2-shard fixture run in `/tmp/branding_shard_merge_smoke` (`shard 1` then `shard 0`) and merge summary emitted in campaign output.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: run 2 shards with small sweep configs against fixture data, verify each creates its own DB file. Then simulate the merge step and verify the unified DB contains candidates from both shards with no duplicates (by name_normalized). Verify campaign_summary.json reflects merged totals.

subtasks.title: Add configurable asyncio concurrency scaling with backpressure
subtasks.description: Enhance the asyncio semaphore in naming_validate_async.py with adaptive concurrency that scales based on error rate and DB lock wait time, plus expose tuning knobs.
subtasks.details: Completed in `scripts/branding/naming_validate_async.py`: replaced fixed semaphore with `AdaptiveSemaphore` and added `--min-concurrency` / `--max-concurrency`. Concurrency now re-evaluates every 50 completed jobs from rolling error rate: >20% halves, <5% grows by ~25% (bounded). Adjustment events emit via `stage_event=... stage=concurrency_adjust`. Final adaptive state is persisted in run summaries under `adaptive_concurrency`.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: create AdaptiveSemaphore with min=2, max=10, initial=5. Simulate 50 'success' signals and verify concurrency increases. Simulate 50 mixed signals with >20% errors and verify concurrency decreases. Verify bounds are respected. Integration: run validator with --min-concurrency=1 --max-concurrency=4 against a test DB and verify it completes without errors.

subtasks.title: Add SQLite contention metrics and lock-wait instrumentation
subtasks.description: Instrument db_lock acquisitions in naming_validate_async.py to measure contention (wait time, acquisition count) and emit metrics in the run summary.
subtasks.details: Completed with `InstrumentedLock` in `scripts/branding/naming_validate_async.py`, now used for `db_lock` in orchestrate flow. Lock metrics (`lock_acquisitions`, `lock_total_wait_ms`, `lock_max_wait_ms`, `lock_contended_count`) are emitted in `stage_event` complete payload and persisted in `run_summary` / `naming_runs.summary_json`. Added tests in `scripts/branding/test_naming_validate_async.py` for lock contention accounting and for presence of lock metrics in orchestrate summary output.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: create InstrumentedLock, acquire/release it from multiple concurrent coroutines, verify stats are non-negative and acquisition count matches expected. Verify that the lock metrics appear in the run summary JSON after a full orchestrate() call with a test DB.

subtasks.title: Build benchmark harness for parallelism tuning
subtasks.description: Create a benchmark script that runs the validation pipeline at various concurrency levels and shard counts, collecting throughput and contention metrics for comparison.
subtasks.details: Completed with new script `scripts/branding/benchmark_validation.py`. Supports `--db`, `--candidate-counts`, `--concurrency-levels`, `--shard-counts`, `--checks`, `--rounds`, and `--quick`. Harness seeds synthetic candidate DBs per shard, executes validator subprocesses in parallel, parses `stage_event` complete payloads, and records wall time/jobs/sec/lock metrics into CSV. Added usage docs in `docs/branding/name_generator_guide.md` section "Benchmark validator parallelism".
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `benchmark_validation.py --quick` and verify it produces a valid CSV with expected columns (concurrency, candidates, wall_time_ms, jobs_per_sec, lock_wait_ms). Verify the benchmark completes without errors on a fresh temp DB. Verify that higher concurrency shows equal or better throughput for cheap-only checks.

tasks.title: Introduce run-level observability
tasks.description: Make campaign progress visible without tailing multiple logs.
tasks.details: Emit structured progress events to stdout plus a compact JSONL heartbeat file in the run directory.
tasks.testStrategy: Run campaign smoke; confirm periodic heartbeat with run/stage percent, ETA, and shard context.

subtasks.title: Define event schema
subtasks.description: Standardize stage, run_id, shard_id, counters, and latency fields.
subtasks.details: Completed implementation in `naming_campaign_runner.py`: added `campaign_event` envelope with standardized fields (`event`, `timestamp`, `run_id`, `stage`, `duration_s`, `exit_code`, shard metadata where relevant) and integrated structured event emission for campaign/run/stage lifecycle.

subtasks.title: Add runner heartbeat emission
subtasks.description: Emit progress at stage boundaries and fixed intervals in long stages.
subtasks.details: Completed implementation in `naming_campaign_runner.py`: live forwarding from generator/validator (`stage_event=`, `async_validation_`, `run_summary=`), stage boundary events (`stage_start`/`stage_complete`), periodic `stage_heartbeat` events (`--heartbeat-interval-s`), and JSONL persistence (`--heartbeat-jsonl`, default `<out-dir>/runs/campaign_heartbeat.jsonl`). Verified via smoke run at `/tmp/brandname_live_progress_smoke3`.

tasks.title: Optimize campaign sharding strategy
tasks.description: Improve shard balancing across sweep combinations to avoid uneven runtime.
tasks.details: Assess current slice-based assignment and add optional weighted scheduling based on historical run durations.
tasks.testStrategy: Compare per-shard completion variance before/after scheduler change.

subtasks.title: Add weighted shard scheduling helpers
subtasks.description: Implement weighted assignment using historical combo durations with deterministic fallback to slice mode.
subtasks.details: Completed in `scripts/branding/naming_campaign_runner.py` via `load_combo_duration_history(...)` and `assign_sweep_combos_to_shards(...)`, including graceful fallback modes (`slice_fallback_no_history`, `slice_fallback_no_matches`).

subtasks.title: Expose scheduling knobs and telemetry
subtasks.description: Add CLI flags and summary/progress telemetry for shard scheduling decisions and predicted load.
subtasks.details: Added CLI options `--shard-scheduling`, `--shard-history-progress-csv`, `--shard-weight-fallback-s`; run rows now include `shard_scheduling` + `combo_key`; campaign summary includes scheduling mode, history metadata, predicted per-shard loads, and assigned combo payload.

subtasks.title: Add scheduling unit tests and docs
subtasks.description: Add deterministic tests for history parsing and weighted balancing and document usage in the guide.
subtasks.details: Added `scripts/branding/test_naming_campaign_runner.py` covering history aggregation, weighted balancing, and fallback behavior; documented weighted sharding knobs in `docs/branding/name_generator_guide.md`.

tasks.title: CI canary for OpenRouter workflow
tasks.description: Add deterministic CI smoke and periodic live canary for provider schema/routing drift.
tasks.details: Run fixture on each PR and live canary on schedule with strict budget and timeout caps.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CI artifacts include candidate artifact, validator summary, and run-level telemetry snapshot.

subtasks.title: Tighten live canary budget and timeout caps
subtasks.description: Add strict latency/stage and spend limits for live OpenRouter canary runs.

subtasks.title: Assert artifact contract in CI smoke
subtasks.description: Enforce required run artifacts in deterministic fixture workflow.
subtasks.details: Added `Verify Smoke Artifact Contract` step in `.github/workflows/branding-ci.yml` to assert candidate artifact presence (`runs/run_*.json`), validator `run_summary=` lines, and heartbeat markers (`campaign_start`, `campaign_complete`).

subtasks.title: Assert artifact contract in live canary
subtasks.description: Enforce artifact contract and cap check in scheduled OpenRouter canary.
subtasks.details: Added `Assert Canary Artifact Contract` step in `.github/workflows/branding-openrouter-canary.yml` with candidate/validator/heartbeat assertions and a hard check that `llm_cost_usd` remains under cap.
